sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31735" key="e)/kbios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκβῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n31735.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deprived of life,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:4:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
